marketName: Data Processing, Hosting, and Related Services

features.name: Mechanical Handle Locking
features.rationale: Table-stakes in DC restricted-zone context. Safety (9): prevents unauthorized entry into caged server zones. Reliability (8): no electrical failure mode during UPS events.

features.name: Audible Alarm Trigger
features.rationale: Commodity baseline. In DC context, primary alert path is SIEM, not audible. Safety (7): on-site deterrent. Reliability (5): audible alarm alone is insufficient for compliance — no audit record.

features.name: Single-Motion Emergency Release
features.rationale: Regulatory mandate — DIN EN 179/1125 compliance is non-discretionary. Safety (9): evacuation cannot be impeded even in high-security zones. Skill (7): untrained visitors can exit.

features.name: Key Override Bypass
features.rationale: Expected for authorized maintenance access. Stress (7) / Pain (7): authorized engineers access without triggering SOC alert. Confidence (5): key override produces NO automatic SIEM log — the critical gap.

features.name: Battery-Powered Operation
features.rationale: Highest-scoring feature in DC context. Power events (UPS switchover, generator start) are when monitoring is most critical. Reliability (9): no single point of failure. Safety (8): alarm fires during power events. Directly addresses E8 (imp=10, opp=14).

features.name: Pre-Alarm Warning
features.rationale: Indifferent in DC context. In a restricted zone, any handle contact is a security event — pre-alarm grace period is counterproductive for DC security posture. Scores 1-3 throughout.

productRelatedNeeds: Minimize the likelihood of an integrity break in chain-of-custody between the EasyWave radio event and the IP gateway SIEM log payload
Minimize the likelihood of RF channel contention from concurrent 868 MHz broadcasts across a 50+ door deployment causing dropped alarm events
Minimize the time required to replace IoT module batteries across a 50+ door DC deployment without triggering accidental alarms
Minimize the time to verify firmware version and radio protocol configuration consistency across all deployed units via the central BUS gateway
